recover-funds.heading: Transaction failed

recover-shares.heading: Transaction failed

remote-failed.heading: Your withdrawal is stuck on Ethereum
remote-failed.heading-deposit: Your deposit is stuck on Ethereum
remote-failed.subheading: The cross-chain step failed. Retry to add more gas and complete the withdrawal, or cancel to return your share tokens to your wallet.
remote-failed.subheading-deposit: The cross-chain step failed. Retry to add more gas and complete the deposit, or cancel to return your funds to your wallet.
remote-failed.subheading-slippage: The price moved past your slippage limit before the final step could run, so your share tokens are still held. Return them to your wallet, then try the withdrawal again with a higher slippage tolerance.
remote-failed.subheading-slippage-deposit: The price moved past your slippage limit before the final step could run, so your funds are still held. Return them to your wallet, then try the deposit again with a higher slippage tolerance.

withdraw.heading: Your withdrawal is ready
withdraw.subheading: This usually happens automatically, but you can do it yourself. This transaction runs on Ethereum.

cancel-modal.description: If you cancel it, your funds will go back to being staked and will no longer be in the cooldown lock.
